scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: bun test packages/protocol/tests/ packages/agent-core/tests/ packages/server/tests/ packages/worker/tests/mcp/ packages/client-tui/tests/ packages/client-telegram/tests/
scripts.test:e2e: bun test packages/e2e/tests/integration/ && bun test packages/worker/tests/integration/
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun test packages/e2e/tests/integration/ packages/e2e/tests/live/ && bun test packages/worker/tests/integration/
scripts.test:coverage: bun test --coverage packages/protocol/tests/ packages/agent-core/tests/ packages/server/tests/ packages/worker/tests/mcp/ packages/client-tui/tests/ packages/client-telegram/tests/ && bun test --coverage packages/e2e/tests/integration/ && bun test --coverage packages/worker/tests/integration/
scripts.test:ci: bun test --bail 1 packages/protocol/tests/ packages/agent-core/tests/ packages/server/tests/ packages/worker/tests/mcp/ packages/client-tui/tests/ packages/client-telegram/tests/ && bun test --bail 1 packages/e2e/tests/integration/ && bun test --bail 1 packages/worker/tests/integration/
